news.headline: Germany's Greens Party won't support draft debt package in parliament
REGENXBIO to present interim biomarker data from RGX-202 trial for Duchenne MD at MDA conference.
news.summary: Today, REGENXBIO Inc. disclosed updated interim biomarker findings from the Phase I/II stage of the AFFINITY DUCHENNE® study of RGX-202, aimed at treating Duchenne muscular dystrophy. The data will be showcased at the 2025 Muscular Dystrophy conference.

news.headline: Kaspi.kz submits Form 20-F for 2024 to SEC.

news.headline: Celsius Holdings (Nasdaq: CELH) to participate in investor conferences, including UBS Global Consumer and Retail Conference on March 12, 2025, and 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17-18, 2025. Fireside chat times are 9:00 a.m. ET on March 12 and approximately 3:30 p.m. ET on March 18. Join live webcasts at https://ir.celsiusholdingsinc.com/even.

Additionally, the company will be participating in the 37th Annual Roth Conference from March 17-18, 2025, holding a fireside chat around 3:30 p.m. ET on March 18. news.headline: Heineken Holding N.V. discloses details of current share repurchase program.
Food Basics is collaborating with Muslim organizations in Ontario to support Ramadan with food and experiences.
news.summary: Food Basics has joined forces with various Muslim organizations throughout Ontario to enhance Ramadan festivities. This collaboration aims to provide support and encouragement by facilitating food donations and creating opportunities for shared experiences during this sacred month.

news.headline: ZYUS Life Sciences receives CAD$1.5M unsecured loan for developing cannabinoid-based pain drugs, closes on March 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Saskatchewan, ZYUS Life Sciences Corporation (TSX-V: ZYUS) has disclosed that an independent director has provided the company with an unsecured loan of CAD$1,500,000. The loan agreement was finalized on March 7, 2025. ZYUS is a Canadian firm specializing in the creation and marketing of innovative cannabinoid-based pharmaceuticals for pain relief.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency funds have seen $4.7B losses in a month. Outflows slow but investor sentiment stays bearish - CoinShares.
news.summary: James Butterfill, Head of Research at CoinShares, noted that while there has been a decrease in outflows, investor sentiment continues to be bearish.

news.headline: Japanese politician Ishiba calls on companies and unions to seek high pay.
News about Simulations Plus presenting at KeyBanc Capital Markets Virtual Healthcare Investor Forum at 2:15pm Eastern Time. $SLP
news.summary: Simulations Plus, Inc., a company trading on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SLP, based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, has revealed that their Chief Executive Officer, Shawn O’Connor, is scheduled to take part in a fireside chat at the KeyBanc Capital Markets Virtual Healthcare Investor Forum. Simulations Plus is known for providing various solutions to the biopharma sector, including cheminformatics, biosimulation, and medical communications. This move signifies their active engagement in industry events and their commitment to sharing insights with potential investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: PCK Intellectual Property introduces new brand identity, focusing on expertise in IP strategy.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, PCK Intellectual Property, a prominent Canadian intellectual property company focusing on patents, trademarks, copyrights, and intellectual property strategies, revealed its newly revamped brand identity. The enhancement comprises a variety of elements aimed at modernizing the company's image.

news.headline: Ingo Payments teams up with Securely for real-time merchant settlements and enhanced payment capabilities.
news.summary: A collaboration between Ingo Payments and Securely in Alpharetta, Georgia aims to revolutionize merchant settlements with advanced ledgering and payments technology. This partnership promises real-time processing, offering increased speed and transparency for merchants. This innovative solution is set to significantly improve the efficiency of merchant settlements, providing a seamless experience for businesses.

news.headline: Mitsubishi Motors Canada introduces AI "Intelligent Companion" for 2025 Outlander, improving customer experience.
news.summary: Mitsubishi Motor Sales of Canada has revealed a groundbreaking AI-driven tool set to revolutionize customer interactions for the latest Mitsubishi Outlander 2025 model. Named "The Intelligent Companion," the tool was introduced on March 5th. This innovation aims to enhance the overall experience for customers seeking the latest features in the automotive industry. Located in London, Armonk, N.Y., and Mississauga, ON, this development showcases a significant step forward for the brand and marks a new era for customer engagement.

news.headline: QAD appoints Sanjay Brahmawar as new CEO, replacing Anton Chilton after 20 years. Sanjay to start on March 17.
news.summary: Santa Barbara, California - QAD, a top provider of cloud-based solutions for manufacturers and supply chains, has revealed the appointment of Sanjay Brahmawar as its new Chief Executive Officer. Sanjay, the former CEO of Software AG, is set to assume his new position starting March 17. He takes over from Anton Chilton, who served for over two decades and is stepping down. Sanjay led a successful transformation initiative at Software AG, overseeing its evolution into a more modern and competitive business.

news.headline: Guns.com reports 10% growth in firearm sales for first 2 months of 2025 despite industry decline.
news.summary: In Burnsville, Minnesota, the leading online firearms marketplace, Guns.com, reported a growth of more than 10% in gun sales compared to the same period last year for the initial two months of 2025. This increase comes at a time when the overall firearms sector is experiencing a decrease in consumer demand.

news.headline: Intelsat and MaxIQ Space are expanding STEM learning to schools in four African countries, aims to increase to 12 schools.
news.summary: Intelsat, a leading satellite and terrestrial network operator, has partnered with educational provider MaxIQ Space to enhance the Africa Space STEM Program in schools across Africa. The initiative, now in its fifth year, is set to grow to 12 schools in four African countries. The program's goal is to offer in-person educational opportunities to students in Kenya, Nigeria, South Africa, and another undisclosed country. This collaboration reflects a significant expansion in efforts to promote Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math education in the region.

news.headline: Stila Cosmetics names Steve Rosen CFO and David Reece COO. Exciting news for the leading beauty brand.
news.summary: In Glendale, California on March 10, 2025, Stila Cosmetics unveiled Steve Rosen as the new Chief Financial Officer (CFO) and David Reece as the Chief Operating Officer (COO). The company cited their extensive industry experience as a key factor in their selection.

news.headline: Alkami to offer $300 million convertible senior notes, aiming to raise funds for digital banking solutions.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas on March 10, 2025, Alkami Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALKT) revealed plans to potentially provide $300 million in cloud-based digital banking solutions for U.S. financial institutions.

news.headline: GIGABYTE partners with TAICCA at SXSW 2025 to showcase AI and XR tech for immersive content creation.
news.summary: Discover the cutting-edge of AI-driven creativity with GIGABYTE AI PCs taking you on a journey to explore innovative realms. In a significant collaboration, GIGABYTE, a prominent player in high-performance computing, joins forces with the Taiwan Creative Content Agency (TAICCA) at the SXSW 2025 XR Lounge. This partnership showcases the latest advancements in AI technology, demonstrating the endless possibilities it offers. news.headline: Rocket Companies is acquiring Redfin, connecting Redfin's 50M monthly visitors to Rocket's mortgage products. Rocket to pay $0.80 special dividend per share.
news.summary: The top real estate brokerage website, which attracts nearly 50 million visitors a month, has teamed up with the biggest mortgage lender. Through this collaboration, Redfin will connect its vast audience to Rocket Companies' mortgage offerings. As part of the deal, Rocket Companies is set to restructure its corporate setup and has announced a unique cash dividend of $0.80 per share of Class A common stock.

news.headline: Avacta Therapeutics will present at Leerink Global Healthcare Conference on March 12, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. ET in Miami.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Avacta Therapeutics, a company focused on developing peptide drug conjugates for anti-tumor treatments, disclosed that they will be participating in the Leerink Global Healthcare Conference on March 12, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time in Miami. The conference will serve as a platform for Avacta to showcase their advancements in delivering potent anti-tumor therapies directly to tumors. The company is listed on AIM (AVCT) and operates in both London and Philadelphia.

news.headline: ECARX to power Geely’s G-Pilot with Skyland Pro ADAS Solution in all Galaxy brand vehicles, inc. E8 sedan.
news.summary: Today, ECARX Holdings Inc. revealed that its Skyland® Pro intelligent driving solution will merge into Geely's G-Pilot unified intelligent driving system. news.headline: Rural King opens 5th Alabama store in Saraland, grand opening from March 14-16.
news.summary: A new Rural King store has been opened in Saraland, Alabama by the family-owned retailer known for catering to the rural lifestyle. The store's grand opening celebrations are scheduled from Friday, March 14 to Sunday, March 16, 2025. This expansion marks an important milestone for Rural King, adding to its growing network of stores and enhancing its presence in the region.Residents of Saraland and nearby areas can now access a wide range of products and services tailored to meet their rural living needs. The new store is expected to create job opportunities and stimulate the local economy, reflecting Rural King's commitment to serving communities. With its focus on providing quality products and excellent customer service, the Saraland store is poised to become a hub for rural residents in the area. Visit the store during the grand opening weekend to explore special promotions, discounts, and giveaways as Rural King welcomes customers to its newest location.

news.headline: Telesat awards QEST a development contract for Telesat Lightspeed Aero Flat Panel Antenna for commercial aviation.
news.summary: Today, Telesat and QEST have signed a development contract for a Telesat Lightspeed Aero Flat Panel Antenna (FPA). This partnership aims to enhance connectivity for airborne applications with innovative technology. The agreement marks a significant milestone in advancing communication solutions, as Telesat is known for its expertise in global broadband services, while QEST specializes in developing cutting-edge antenna systems. The collaboration between the two companies holds promise for improving in-flight connectivity for aircraft, demonstrating a commitment to enhancing the airborne communication experience. This agreement signifies a step towards revolutionizing airborne connectivity through the installment of advanced antenna systems.

news.headline: White Castle adds ranch flavor to chicken rings; now available in frozen aisle. Introduced on National Ranch Day.

Consumers can now find this craveable flavor infusion in the frozen section of stores in Minneapolis and Columbus, Ohio. The product expansion adds to the existing lineup of chicken rings and showcases the brand's commitment to offering innovative and delicious options.

news.headline: NLS Pharmaceutics CEO sent a letter to shareholders. NLSP on NASDAQ. A Swiss biopharmaceutical co. focuses on CNS therapies.

news.headline: GDS in China sells 70% equity in data centers, values at 13x EBITDA. China Life leads institutional investor subscription.
news.summary: GDS Holdings Limited, a data center developer in China, has sold a 70% equity interest in certain data centers for an implied enterprise value to EBITDA multiple of around 13 times. The sale involved a unique transaction with a private REIT, with GDS retaining operational rights. The assets have been purchased by top Chinese institutional investors, including China Life Insurance Company Limited. The ABS will be listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange, and the deal is structured for potential injection into a public REIT in the future.

news.headline: SimSpace introduces Stack Optimizer to enhance security, IT performance. Allows organizations to evaluate and optimize infrastructure.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 10, 2025, Boston-based company SimSpace unveiled Stack Optimizer, a cutting-edge tool aimed at assisting organizations in assessing, testing, and enhancing their security and IT systems. This innovative solution harnesses SimSpace's expertise in creating highly authentic simulated environments to provide organizations with an effective means of optimizing their infrastructure.

news.headline: Automotive sliding load floor market to reach USD 3,517M by 2035 with 7.3% CAGR growth; valued at USD 1,738M in 2025.
news.summary: The Automotive Sliding Load Floor market is on track to reach a valuation of USD 1,738 million by 2025 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 7.3% till 2035. Advancements in material science and engineering are driving this growth. Key players in the automotive sector are increasingly using these systems to enhance user experience and optimize space in SUVs and commercial vans. The use of light materials like composites and advanced polymers is making these systems more efficient and improving vehicle performance. The market also sees a rise in demand for EVs, leading to a need for maximized storage for batteries and cargo volume. The incorporation of smart technologies like sensors and automation could further improve the utility of sliding load floors. The market study projects a growth to USD 3,517 million by 2035, with an absolute $ opportunity of USD 1,778 million from 2025 to 2035. North America is expected to hold a market share of 34.2% in 2035. Leading market players include ASG Group Associate Ltd, Cargo Ease Inc, Cargo Glide, Extendobed.

news.summary: Sigrid Therapeutics (Sigrid) has recently obtained access to the U.S. market for its SiPore® technology after the successful completion of the SHINE study, the largest study on prediabetes. This study showcased the effectiveness of Carb...

news.headline: Tower Semi & Innolight team up to produce SiPho solutions for AI & data centers. Laser requirements halved.
news.summary: Cutting-edge technology has been developed to reduce laser requirements by 50% for efficient, high-capacity optical module manufacturing, catering to the increasing needs of the AI and data centers markets. This advancement is set to revolutionize production processes, allowing for streamlined and cost-effective manufacturing. The innovation comes as demand for optical modules surges, with projections indicating a significant uptick in the market. This development is poised to not only meet but also surpass current market demands, providing a competitive edge in this rapidly expanding sector.

news.headline: Smartkem appoints Jonathan Watkins as COO to lead global operations and partnerships in semiconductor tech commercialization.
news.summary: A seasoned leader will be heading the efforts to commercialize semiconductor technology and establish strategic partnerships on a global scale. Headquartered in Manchester, England, Smartkem (Nasdaq: SMTK) aims to revolutionize the electronics industry with an innovative transistor technology. This development was announced on March 10, 2025.

news.headline: Beamr will present at Loop Capital Markets 2025 Investor Conference on March 10, 2025. Headquarters in Herzliya, Israel.
news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel on March 10, 2025, Beamr Imaging Ltd. (NASDAQ: BMR), renowned for its video optimization technology, disclosed plans to participate in an upcoming investor conference through a virtual presentation.

news.headline: International Petroleum Corp repurchased 352,360 shares under its share repurchase program from March 3 to 7, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, International Petroleum Corporation (IPC) disclosed that they had repurchased 352,360 of their common shares (ISIN: CA46016U1084) from March 3 to 7, 2025. This buyback was carried out under IPC's normal course issuer bid/share repurchase program. IPC is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm under the tickers TSX: IPC and Nasdaq Stockholm: IPCO, respectively.

news.headline: Tetrous, Inc. closes Series A financing round, raising $6.5 million for growth in bone-to-tendon healing tech.
news.summary: A Sherman Oaks-based start-up, Tetrous, Inc., specialized in bone-to-tendon healing post orthopedic procedures, recently concluded its Series A funding with an impressive $6,500,000 raised. news.headline: Albert Thompson joins Capital Square as Vice President, National Accounts in tax-advantaged real estate investments firm.

Capital Square is recognized as a prominent sponsor of tax-advantaged real estate investments and an engaged developer and manager of housing communities across the United States.Thompson will be responsible for overseeing national operations and strategy as part of his new role.

news.headline: Anfield Energy Inc. to hold special shareholder meeting on March 31, 2025 at 10:00 AM in Vancouver for NASDAQ listing pursuit. Meeting documents available online.

Anfield Energy Inc. can be found on TSX.V with the symbol AEC, OTCQB as ANLDF, and FRANKFURT as 0AD.

news.headline: BlockFills and CQG collaborate to provide streaming crypto liquidity on CQG Platform. Partnership offers new trading options.

This collaboration introduces new trading vehicles and tools for clients of both companies. BlockFills specializes in digital asset trading and market technology, while CQG is known for its advanced trading solutions. This venture is expected to benefit a wide range of clients, with access to innovative trading options and tools. The partnership aims to enhance the trading experience for users, providing them with more efficient and diverse ways to interact with the market.

news.headline: Bio-Techne launches Leo - a new high-throughput Simple Western System; the latest technology for automated protein analysis.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Bio-Techne Corporation shared the launch of the Leo™ System, enhanced with Simple Western™ Technology. This advanced system, an extension of the current Simple Western range, provides automated protein size resolution. Bio-Techne, listed on NASDAQ as TECH, has initiated shipments of the Leo™ System to customers.

news.headline: Mr. Peanut makes movie debut in Netflix's The Electric State on March 14 with Russo Brothers, starring Millie Bobby Brown.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Austin, Minnesota, MR. PEANUT® and the iconic PLANTERS® NUTmobile will be featured in Netflix's upcoming film, The Electric State. This movie is directed by The Russo Brothers from AGBO and will star Millie Bobby Brown. This collaboration marks an exciting venture for the characters as they make their debut on the big screen.

news.headline: Positive results from trials of Lorundrostat for hypertension: lorundrostat 50mg led to 16.9mmHg reduction in systolic BP (p<0.0001) at week 6, 19.0mmHg at week 12, and 7.9mmHg reduction in 24hr ABPM at the end of treatment. Good safety profile shown. Advance-HTN results to be presented on March 29, 2025, at American College of Cardiology Scientific Sessions. Conference call scheduled for 8:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: The Launch-HTN trial successfully reached its primary goal with the 50 mg dose of lorundrostat showing a significant reduction of 16.9 mmHg in systolic blood pressure at week 6. This resulted in a placebo-adjusted reduction of 9.1 mmHg with a p-value of less than 0.0001 when assessed through automated office blood pressure. Furthermore, the same dose of lorundrostat achieved a reduction of 19.0 mmHg in systolic blood pressure and an 11.7 mmHg placebo-adjusted reduction by the end of the 12-week treatment period in the same trial. In the Advance-HTN study, the lorundrostat 50 mg dose met its primary objective, demonstrating a highly significant 7.9 mmHg placebo-adjusted reduction in blood pressure as assessed by 24hr ABPM at the end of the 12-week treatment period. All trials showed lorundrostat to have a favorable safety and tolerability profile. The full results of the Advance-HTN trial will be shared on March 29, 2025, at the American College of Cardiology Scientific Sessions. A conference call is scheduled for today at 8:00 a.m. ET.

news.headline: On March 7, 2025, Traxys and HNK Alpha executed the first lithium carbonate futures block trade on Abaxx Commodity Futures Exchange.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Abaxx Technologies Inc. disclosed the completion of the inaugural lithium carbonate futures block trade on March 7, 2025. As a key player in financial software and market infrastructure, Abaxx is the majority shareholder of Abaxx Singapore Pte Ltd., which owns Abaxx Commodity Exchange and Clearinghouse. The trade, involving Traxys and HNK Alpha, marks a significant milestone for Abaxx in its role as a producer of the SmarterMarkets™ Podcast. The trade was executed as a part of the company's operations as it operates under the tickers CBOE:ABXX and OTCQX:ABXXF.

news.headline: Diversified Energy, FuelCell Energy, & TESIAC join to create an acquisition & development company for off-grid data center power projects using coal mine methane & natural gas, aiming for operational power supply within 2 years.
news.summary: Two initiatives are working to address the energy demands of data centers by ensuring a significant amount of operational power will be available within the next 24 months.

news.headline: AIP Realty Trust in VANCOUVER, TSXV: AIP.U, gives update on expansion plans execution as of Mar 10, 2025.
news.summary: A real estate company based in Vancouver, British Columbia called AIP Realty Trust, also known as AIP, recently shared a corporate update on March 10, 2025. The company is listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol AIP.U. The update focused on the advancement of its expansion strategies.

news.headline: Brad Schwartz appointed as EVP, CFO of First Bank.
news.summary: 1. In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.9%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month.2. The GDP growth for the last quarter exceeded expectations, reaching a remarkable 5.2%. This positive development is largely attributed to increased consumer spending and robust exports.3. The stock market also surged, with the main index hitting a record high of 35,000 points. Investor confidence has been bolstered by strong corporate earnings and positive economic indicators.4. However, inflation remains a concern as prices continue to rise steadily. The consumer price index climbed by 2.5%, prompting policymakers to closely monitor the situation and assess potential interventions.

news.headline: 1895 Bancorp of Wisconsin, Inc. now on OTCQX Best Market after formerly on NASDAQ - part of 12,000 securities traded.
news.summary: In New York on March 10, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that 1895 Bancorp of Wisconsin, Inc. (OTCQX: BCOW), the parent company of PyraMax Bank, is now eligible for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. oversees regulated trading platforms for approximately 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Prior to this, 1895 Bancorp of Wisconsin, Inc. was listed on NASDAQ.
